chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D- 205 of 2025 along with C.P No. D- 489 of 2025. Date Order with signature of Judge Priority. 1) For hearing of CMA No. 1052/25 (stay) 2) For hearing of main case. ------------ 05.05.2025. Mr. Khalid Jawed Khan, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Solangi, Advocate along with Shaffaque Saqib, Assistant Commissioner-IR, Zone-II, MTO, Karachi. -------------------- Today, learned Counsel for the Petitioner has filed statement along with order passed by the Commissioner Inland Revenue (Appeals); whereby, issue stands decided in favour of the Petitioner. The same is taken on record. Accordingly, the Petition has served its purpose; hence disposed of with pending application(s). Office to place copy of this order in the connected case. Acting Chief Justice Judge Ayaz P.S.
